channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill at least five, damage ship in port
item.description: Russian attacks on Ukraine killed at least five people and damaged a ship in port. Ukrainian attacks on Russia injure at least six people in Vologda region and annexed Crimea.

item.title: How American taxpayers fund Trump’s wars
item.description: Americans worked 50 days in 2025 to fund war efforts. Contractors received twice the tax money as US troops. Contractors got twice the tax money that US troops did. How American taxpayers fund Trump’s wars.

item.title: World reacts to shooting at White House correspondents’ dinner
item.description: A shooting occurred at the White House correspondents’ dinner. Politicians and world leaders condemned the attack. US politicians from across the aisle, world leaders condemn the attack and express relief that Trump is safe.

item.title: China launches Pakistani satellite
item.description: China launched the PRSC-EO3 satellite for Pakistan using a Long March-6 carrier rocket. The satellite successfully entered its planned orbit at 8:15 p. m. Beijing Time. The satellite named PRSC-EO3 was lifted off at 8:15 p.

item.title: Palestinians Vote In First Gaza Local Elections In Over 20 Years
item.description: Palestinians voted in local elections in Gaza for the first time in over 20 years. The elections did not include Israeli-annexed east Jerusalem. Palestinians Vote In First Gaza Local Elections In Over 20 Years.

item.title: US Bases Suffered Massive Damage In Iran Strikes, Repair May Cost Billions: Report
item.description: Iran strikes damaged US bases, potentially costing billions to repair, including a damaged AWACS aircraft. A damaged US AWACS aircraft following an Iranian strike on a base in Saudi. US Bases Suffered Massive Damage In Iran Strikes, Repair May Cost Billions: Report.

item.title: Trump Evacuated After Gunshots At Event: A Look At Past Threats, Attempts
item.description: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots at an event, his second close call after two assassination attempts during the 2024 campaign. This isn't the first time Trump has faced such a situation, as he had met with two assassination attempts during the 2024 campaign.

item.title: Sri Lanka seeks investors for loss-making Mattala airport in Hambantota
item.description: Sri Lanka seeks investors for the loss-making Mattala airport, which India has shown interest in operating through a joint venture. India has in the past expressed interest to operate the airport in Mattala, which has made headlines as the ‘world’s emptiest airport’, including through a joint venture with a Russian company.

item.title: Zurich-bound Swiss plane aborts take-off at Delhi airport
item.description: A Swiss plane bound for Zurich aborted take-off at Delhi airport with 228 passengers and four infants on board. Six passengers are undergoing medical evaluation. Zurich-bound Swiss plane aborts take-off at Delhi airport.

item.title: Iran FM Says 'Yet To See If The US Is Truly Serious About Diplomacy'
item.description: Iran's foreign minister said they have yet to see if the US is truly serious about diplomacy. The standoff between the US and Iran has choked off nearly all exports through the strait.

item.title: We can make sure another Chornobyl disaster does not happen, here is how
item.description: Decentralised renewable energy systems provide a safe alternative to prevent disasters like Chornobyl. In war and peace, decentralised renewable energy systems provide a safe and resilient alternative. We can make sure another Chornobyl disaster does not happen, here is how.

item.title: Japan deploys 1,400 firefighters to battle raging wildfires in the north
item.description: Japan deployed 1,400 firefighters to battle wildfires in the north. The fires have been burning for five days, threatening a town still recovering from the 2011 earthquake and tsunami.

item.title: Trump Event Shooting At Same Hotel Where Ronald Reagan Was Shot 45 Years Ago
item.description: A Trump event was evacuated after gunshots at the same hotel where Ronald Reagan was shot 45 years ago. The entire room was ordered evacuated, and several hundred guests made their way into the Hilton lobby.

item.title: White House Press Dinner Shooting Linked To Iran War? What Trump Said
item.description: Donald Trump was evacuated from the White House Correspondents' Association dinner after gunshots were heard at the venue. Donald Trump was evacuated from an annual dinner of the White House Correspondents' Association after gunshots were heard at the venue.

item.title: Trump Event Shooting Live Updates: Israel's Netanyahu "Shocked" By Trump's Assassination Bid
item.description: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu expressed shock at the assassination attempt on Trump. Trump Event Shooting Live Updates: Israel's Netanyahu "Shocked" By Trump's Assassination Bid.

item.title: Taliban Foreign Ministry Stresses Sports Diplomacy to Expand International Relations
item.description: The Taliban Foreign Ministry has announced plans to expand international relations through sports diplomacy. The ministry sees sports as a way to build connections with other countries and promote cultural exchange.

item.title: Blockades, Diplomacy, and Tensions
item.description: Tensions between Iran and the US have escalated. The situation is being managed through blockades and diplomatic efforts. Iran and US: Blockades, Diplomacy, and Tensions Devdiscourse.

item.title: What’s happening on day 58 as Tehran-Washington talks stall?
item.description: Tehran-Washington talks have stalled. Trump canceled a planned trip to Pakistan by his envoys, further complicating efforts to end the war with Iran. Trump calls off planned trip to Pakistan by his envoys, in the latest setback to efforts to end the war with Iran.

item.title: Alaudinov Warns NATO May Target Russia After Iran War
item.description: Alaudinov warned that NATO may target Russia after the Iran war. He made this statement in the context of rising tensions between Russia and NATO. Alaudinov Warns NATO May Target Russia After Iran War Военное дело.

item.title: What we know about the Trump press gala shooting
item.description: Shots were heard at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner at the Washington Hilton Hotel. The incident occurred after the welcoming speech. Shots were heard after the welcoming speech at the annual dinner of the White House Correspondents' Association being held at the Washington Hilton Hotel.
